parts.text: /review Verify fix for accepted-cancel reconciliation in workspace-deployment-runner.ts: ensure we continue polling to provider terminal state and do not prematurely mark cancelled. Blocking issues only.

1091:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);

1095:   if (publishOptions.provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
1096:     const relativeOutputDir = publishOptions.outputDir;

1122:     }
1123:     throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
1124:   }
1125:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {

1135:     },
1136:   });
1137:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'running', {
1138:     workspaceId,

1141: 
1142:   let providerStatus: WorkspaceDeployStatusResult = {
1143:     status: createResult.status,
1144:     deployedUrl: createResult.deployedUrl,
1145:   };
1146:   let cancelAttempted = false;
1147:   let cancelAccepted = false;
1148:   const maxPollAttempts = parseIntegerString(env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER_MAX_POLLS, 120, 1, 600);
1149:   const pollIntervalMs = parseIntegerString(env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROVIDER_POLL_INTERVAL_MS, 1500, 50, 10000);
1150:   for (let attempt = 0; attempt < maxPollAttempts; attempt += 1) {
1151:     await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId).catch(async (error) => {
1152:         if (error instanceof CancelRequestedError) {
1153:           if (!cancelAttempted) {
1154:             cancelAttempted = true;
1155:             let cancel;
1156:             try {
1157:               cancel = await provider.cancelDeployment(createResult.providerDeploymentId);
1158:             } catch (providerCancelError) {
1159:               const providerError = normalizeProviderError(providerCancelError);
1160:               if (isRetryableProviderError(providerError.code, providerError.message)) {
1161:                 throw new QueueRetryError('Provider cancel status is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
1162:               }
1163:               throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
1164:             }
1165:             cancelAccepted = cancel.accepted;
1166:             await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1167:               workspaceId,
1168:             deploymentId,
1169:             eventType: 'deployment_provider_cancel_requested',
1170:             payload: {
1171:               providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1172:               accepted: cancel.accepted,
1173:               },
1174:             });
1175:             if (!cancel.accepted) {
1176:               await env.DB
1177:                 .prepare(
1178:                   `UPDATE workspace_deployments
1179:                    SET cancel_requested_at = NULL,
1180:                        updated_at = ?
1181:                    WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'running'`
1182:                 )
1183:                 .bind(new Date().toISOString(), deploymentId, workspaceId)
1184:                 .run();
1185:             }
1186:           }
1187:           if (cancelAccepted) {
1188:             return;
1189:           }
1190:         return;
1191:       }
1192:       throw error;
1193:     });
1194: 
1195:     if (providerStatus.status === 'succeeded' || providerStatus.status === 'failed' || providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
1196:       break;
1197:     }
1198: 
1199:     await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, pollIntervalMs));
1200:     try {
1201:       providerStatus = await provider.getDeploymentStatus(createResult.providerDeploymentId);
1202:     } catch (error) {
1203:       const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
1204:       if (isRetryableProviderError(providerError.code, providerError.message)) {
1205:         throw new QueueRetryError('Provider status endpoint is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
1206:       }
1207:       throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
1208:     }
1209:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1210:       workspaceId,
1211:       deploymentId,
1212:       eventType: 'deployment_provider_status',
1213:       payload: {
1214:         providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1215:         status: providerStatus.status,
1216:         deployedUrl: providerStatus.deployedUrl,
1217:       },
1218:     });
1219:   }
1220: 
1221:   if (providerStatus.status === 'queued' || providerStatus.status === 'running') {
1222:     throw new PolicyError(
1223:       'provider_deploy_failed',
1224:       `Provider deployment did not reach terminal state within polling window (${maxPollAttempts} attempts)`
1225:     );
1226:   }
1227: 
1228:   if (providerStatus.status === 'failed') {
1229:     throw new PolicyError(providerStatus.errorCode ?? 'provider_deploy_failed', providerStatus.errorMessage ?? 'Provider deployment failed');
1230:   }
1231: 
1232:   if (providerStatus.status === 'cancelled') {
1233:     await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'provider_cancelled');
1234:     return;
1235:   }
1236: 
1237:   const deployedUrl = providerStatus.deployedUrl ?? createResult.deployedUrl;
1238:   if (!deployedUrl) {
1239:     throw new PolicyError('provider_deploy_failed', 'Provider deployment did not return a deployed URL');
1240:   }
1241: 
1242:   const finishedAt = new Date().toISOString();
1243:   const successResult = {
1244:     url: deployedUrl,
1245:     artifact: {
1246:       sourceBundleKey,
1247:       sourceSnapshotSha256: sourceBundle.sha256,
1248:       outputBundleSha256: outputBundle.sha256,
1249:       outputDir: publishOutputDir,
1250:     },
1251:     provenance: {
1252:       workspaceId,
1253:       taskId,
1254:       operationId,
1255:       trigger: typeof provenance.trigger === 'string' ? provenance.trigger : 'manual',
1256:     },
1257:     rollbackOnFailure,
1258:   };
1259: 
1260:   let markedSucceeded = await markWorkspaceDeploymentSucceededIfNotCancelled(env.DB, {
1261:     workspaceId,
1262:     deploymentId,
1263:     sourceSnapshotSha256: sourceBundle.sha256,
1264:     sourceBundleKey,
1265:     deployedUrl,
1266:     providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1267:     result: successResult,
1268:     finishedAt,
1269:   });
1270: 
1271:   if (!markedSucceeded) {
1272:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1273:     if (latest?.status === 'running' && latest.cancelRequestedAt && providerStatus.status === 'succeeded') {
1274:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'succeeded', {
1275:         workspaceId,
1276:         sourceSnapshotSha256: sourceBundle.sha256,
1277:         sourceBundleKey,

1279:         providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1280:         cancelRequestedAt: null,
1281:         result: successResult,
1282:         errorCode: null,
1283:         errorMessage: null,
1284:         finishedAt,
1285:       });
1286:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1287:         workspaceId,
1288:         deploymentId,
1289:         eventType: 'deployment_cancel_rejected',
1290:         payload: {
1291:           providerDeploymentId: createResult.providerDeploymentId,
1292:           providerStatus: providerStatus.status,
1293:         },
1294:       });
1295:       markedSucceeded = true;
1296:     } else if (latest?.cancelRequestedAt) {
1297:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1298:       return;
1299:     } else {
1300:       return;
1301:     }
1302:   }
1303: 
1304:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1305:     workspaceId,
1306:     deploymentId,
1307:     eventType: 'deployment_succeeded',
1308:       payload: {
1309:         deployedUrl,
1310:         sourceBundleKey,
1311:         sourceSnapshotSha256: sourceBundle.sha256,
1312:       },
1313:     });
1314: 
1315:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {

1318:     deployedUrl,
1319:     deployedAt: finishedAt,

1325: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentPreflight(
1326:   env: Env,
1327:   workspaceId: string,
1328:   options?: Partial<DeploymentValidationOptions & DeploymentAutoFixOptions & DeploymentPublishOptions>
1329: ): Promise<{
1330:   ok: boolean;
1331:   toolchain: WorkspaceToolchainProfile | null;
1332:   checks: Array<{ code: string; ok: boolean; details?: string }>;
1333:   remediations: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[];
1334: }> {
1335:   const checks: Array<{ code: string; ok: boolean; details?: string }> = [];
1336:   const remediations: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[] = [];
1337:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
1338:   if (!workspace || workspace.status !== 'ready') {
1339:     checks.push({ code: 'workspace_ready', ok: false, details: 'Workspace is not ready' });
1340:     return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1341:   }
1342:   checks.push({ code: 'workspace_ready', ok: true });
1343: 
1344:   const sandbox = await sandboxResolver(env, workspace.sandboxId);
1345:   const workspaceProjectRootRaw =
1346:     typeof workspace.sourceProjectRoot === 'string' && workspace.sourceProjectRoot.trim() ? workspace.sourceProjectRoot : '.';
1347:   let workspaceProjectRoot = '.';
1348:   try {
1349:     workspaceProjectRoot = normalizeProjectRoot(workspaceProjectRootRaw);
1350:   } catch (error) {
1351:     checks.push({
1352:       code: 'project_root',
1353:       ok: false,
1354:       details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
1355:     });
1356:     return { ok: false, toolchain: null, checks, remediations };
1357:   }
1358:   const autoFixBaseline = parseBoolean(options?.rehydrateBaseline, false);
1359:   const autoFixBootstrapToolchain = parseBoolean(options?.bootstrapToolchain, false);

(Showing lines 1090-1359 of 1810. Use offset=1360 to continue.)

1466: export async function processWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
1467:   const claimed = await claimWorkspaceDeploymentForExecution(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1468:   if (!claimed) {
1469:     const existing = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1470:     if (existing && existing.status !== 'queued' && existing.status !== 'running') {
1471:       try {
1472:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1473:       } catch (reconcileError) {
1474:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
1475:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
1476:         }
1477:       }
1478:       return;
1479:     }
1480: 
1481:     if (existing?.status === 'queued' && existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1482:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1483:       return;
1484:     }
1485: 
1486:     if (existing?.status === 'running') {
1487:       if (isRunningDeploymentStale(existing.startedAt)) {
1488:         if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1489:           await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested_stale');
1490:           return;
1491:         }
1492:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1493:           workspaceId,
1494:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1495:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1496:         });
1497:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1498:           workspaceId,
1499:           deploymentId,
1500:           eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1501:           payload: {
1502:             code: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1503:             message: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1504:           },
1505:         });
1506:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1507:           deploymentId,
1508:           status: 'failed',
1509:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
1510:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
1511:         });
1512:         return;
1513:       }
1514: 
1515:       if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
1516:         throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment cancel requested while running; wait for active attempt to reconcile');
1517:       }
1518: 
1519:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment is already running; defer redelivery');
1520:     }
1521:     return;
1522:   }
1523: 
1524:   try {
1525:     const flags = await loadRuntimeFlags(env);
1526:     if (!flags.workspaceDeployEnabled) {
1527:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1528:         workspaceId,
1529:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
1530:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
1531:       });
1532:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1533:         workspaceId,
1534:         deploymentId,
1535:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1536:         payload: { code: 'workspace_deploy_disabled', message: 'Workspace deploy is disabled' },
1537:       });
1538:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1539:         deploymentId,
1540:         status: 'failed',
1541:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
1542:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
1543:       });
1544:       return;
1545:     }
1546: 
1547:     await executeWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1548:   } catch (error) {
1549:     const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1550:     if (deployment && deployment.status !== 'queued' && deployment.status !== 'running') {
1551:       try {
1552:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1553:       } catch (reconcileError) {
1554:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
1555:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
1556:         }
1557:       }
1558:       return;
1559:     }
1560: 
1561:     if (error instanceof CancelRequestedError) {
1562:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1563:       return;
1564:     }
1565: 
1566:     if (error instanceof PolicyError) {
1567:       const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(
1568:         (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId))?.rollbackOnFailure,
1569:         true
1570:       );
1571:       const rollback = await resolveRollbackContextSafely(workspaceId, deploymentId, rollbackOnFailure, env);
1572: 
1573:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1574:         workspaceId,
1575:         errorCode: error.code,
1576:         errorMessage: error.message,
1577:         result: { rollback },
1578:       });
1579:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1580:         workspaceId,
1581:         deploymentId,
1582:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1583:         payload: { code: error.code, message: error.message, rollback },
1584:       });
1585:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1586:         deploymentId,
1587:         status: 'failed',
1588:         errorCode: error.code,
1589:         errorMessage: error.message,
1590:       });
1591:       return;
1592:     }
1593: 
1594:     const attemptCount = deployment?.attemptCount ?? 0;
1595:     const maxRetries = deployment?.maxRetries ?? 0;
1596:     if ((error instanceof QueueRetryError || isTransientFailure(error)) && attemptCount <= maxRetries) {
1597:       const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
1598:       if (latest?.cancelRequestedAt) {
1599:         let shouldCancelLocally = true;
1600:         const requestPayload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
1601:         const providerName = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(requestPayload?.provider, env);
1602: 
1603:         if (latest.providerDeploymentId) {
1604:           try {
1605:             const provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(providerName, env);
1606:             const cancel = await provider.cancelDeployment(latest.providerDeploymentId);
1607:             await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1608:               workspaceId,
1609:               deploymentId,
1610:               eventType: 'deployment_provider_cancel_requested',
1611:               payload: {
1612:                 providerDeploymentId: latest.providerDeploymentId,
1613:                 accepted: cancel.accepted,
1614:                 retryPath: true,
1615:               },
1616:             });
1617:             if (!cancel.accepted) {
1618:               await env.DB
1619:                 .prepare(
1620:                   `UPDATE workspace_deployments
1621:                    SET cancel_requested_at = NULL,
1622:                        updated_at = ?
1623:                    WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'running'`
1624:                 )
1625:                 .bind(new Date().toISOString(), deploymentId, workspaceId)
1626:                 .run();
1627:               shouldCancelLocally = false;
1628:             }
1629:           } catch (providerCancelError) {
1630:             if (providerCancelError instanceof QueueRetryError) {
1631:               throw providerCancelError;
1632:             }
1633:             const providerError = normalizeProviderError(providerCancelError);
1634:             if (isRetryableProviderError(providerError.code, providerError.message)) {
1635:               throw new QueueRetryError('Provider cancel status is temporarily unavailable; retry requested');
1636:             }
1637:             throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
1638:           }
1639:         }
1640: 
1641:         if (shouldCancelLocally) {
1642:           await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
1643:           return;
1644:         }
1645:       }
1646: 
1647:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
1648:         workspaceId,
1649:         startedAt: null,
1650:         finishedAt: null,
1651:         errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
1652:         errorMessage: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
1653:       });
1654:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1655:         workspaceId,
1656:         deploymentId,
1657:         eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
1658:         payload: { attemptCount, maxRetries },
1659:       });
1660:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment transient failure; retry requested');
1661:     }
1662: 
1663:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1664:     const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(
1665:       (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId))?.rollbackOnFailure,
1666:       true
1667:     );
1668:     const rollback = await resolveRollbackContextSafely(workspaceId, deploymentId, rollbackOnFailure, env);
1669: 
1670:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
1671:       workspaceId,
1672:       errorCode: 'deployment_failed',
1673:       errorMessage: message,
1674:       result: { rollback },
1675:     });
1676:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
1677:       workspaceId,
1678:       deploymentId,
1679:       eventType: 'deployment_failed',
1680:       payload: {
1681:         code: 'deployment_failed',
1682:         message,
1683:         rollback,
1684:       },
1685:     });
1686:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
1687:       deploymentId,
1688:       status: 'failed',
1689:       errorCode: 'deployment_failed',
1690:       errorMessage: message,
1691:     });
1692:   }
1693: }

1695: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(
1696:   env: Env,
1697:   workspaceId: string,
1698:   deploymentId: string,

state.title: packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts

parts.text:
Found 1 blocking issue.

- `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1598`  
  In the transient-retry path, when `latest.cancelRequestedAt` is set and `provider.cancelDeployment(...)` returns `accepted: true`, the code still leaves `shouldCancelLocally = true` and immediately calls `markDeploymentCancelled(...)` at `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1642`.  
  That prematurely marks the deployment cancelled without waiting for provider terminal state, which is exactly the regression this fix is trying to avoid.  
  Expected behavior here should match the main polling loop: accepted cancel => keep/retry polling provider status until terminal (`cancelled`/`succeeded`/`failed`), and only mark local cancelled once provider terminal state confirms it (or cancel was explicitly rejected).
